SectorAnalysis.description: Structured extraction for a single sector from the day's news.

entities.description: Named companies, organizations, or notable figures mentioned.
entities.title: Entities

sector.description: Sector name from the fixed taxonomy.
sector.title: Sector

sentiment.description: Overall market sentiment for this sector.
sentiment.title: Sentiment

news_category.description: Primary type of news event driving this sector.
news_category.title: News Category

extraction_status.description: 'ok' if full extraction succeeded; 'partial' if evidence was thin.
extraction_status.title: Extraction Status

SectorAnalysis.title: SectorAnalysis

schema.description: Analysis of all relevant sectors found in a single day's news feed.

sectors.description: List of ALL relevant sectors (1–8 max). Only include sectors with clear evidence in the news.
sectors.title: Sectors

schema.title: MultiSectorAnalysis

messages.content:
You are Ava, a sharp trader assistant. Analyze the FULL news feed and extract ALL relevant sectors.

RULES:
- Output ONLY valid JSON matching the schema provided.
- If no sector can be identified, return: {"sectors": []}
- Each sector must use a name from the enum exactly as written.
- Fill ALL required fields for each sector.
- No duplicate sectors. Maximum 8 sectors.
- No extra text outside JSON.

Markets keep believing it: Analysts still assume that, despite the continued conflict, a deal will eventually be reached that ends the war and reopens the Strait of Hormuz.. 2026-06-10: Trump pledges more Iran strikes, saying U.S. will be 'attacking them very hard': President Donald Trump promised more attacks on Iran after strikes resumed this week. Investors are nervous about their positions.. 2026-06-10: College sticker prices top $100,000 at 16 schools — but many students pay significantly less: The cost of attendance at a growing number of colleges is now more than six figures a year, according to data from The Princeton Review.. 2026-06-10: World Cup travel boost hasn't materialized for U.S. businesses — yet: The expected travel boom from the World Cup is looking like it will be a city-by-city, match-by-match test of pricing power.. 2026-06-10: Volatility surge has trader eyeing one 'stable' stock: Mike Khouw is looking for a stable, cash-generating business where he can sell volatility instead of buying drama.. 2026-06-10: An unusual derivative play off SpaceX’s IPO success: A maker of space gases: Rothschild & Co. That’s up from more than $35 billion in the 2022 tournament.. 2026-06-10: Two reasons for optimism after Tuesday's whipsaw market sell-off: There's reason for optimism, judging by bullish options flows around stocks that do better when interest-rates stay lower, and call-buyers who are prepared for the biggest move in Oracle since Covid.. 2026-06-10: 10-year Treasury yield is steady even after data showing highest inflation since 2023: U.S. Treasury yields were little changed on Wednesday as traders assessed critical inflation data.. 2026-06-10: Beijing escalating AI espionage to catch up with the U.S. on tech, cybersecurity firm says: U.S. cybersecurity giant CrowdStrike said China-based entities made over half of state-sponsored cyberattacks on tech firms for artificial intelligence assets.. 2026-06-10: Trump says Iran will 'pay the price' and claims they have 'taken too long' to agree to a deal: The president's comments came after U.S. forces on Tuesday evening launched strikes against Iran.. 2026-06-10: Weekly mortgage demand surges nearly 11% higher, despite volatile interest rates: Mortgage demand from both current homeowners and potential buyers rose sharply, even  though interest rates climbed as well.. 2026-06-10: Super Micro stock falls 13% on $7 billion financing plans as company touts AI server orders: Super Micro is the latest company tied to the AI boom to announce that it's tapping the capital markets.. 2026-06-10: China May wholesale inflation hits near 4-year high on Iran war-led higher input costs, AI boom   : The Middle East conflict has given China's economy a reflationary boost as energy and raw material disruptions deepened.. 2026-06-10: Energy prices take center stage as the ECB prepares to decide on rates: The ECB is expected to raise rates by 25 basis points as higher energy prices drive inflation and raise concerns about broader price pressures.
